import os
os.environ['EPOCHS'] = '70'
os.environ['BS'] = '64'
os.environ['DROP'] = '0.4'
os.environ['LR'] = '1e-3'
os.environ['RC'] = '48'
os.environ['DC'] = '48'
os.environ['SC'] = '256'
os.environ['EC'] = '512'
os.environ['USE_TOD'] = '0'
import shutil
import torch, numpy as np, random
seed = 2024
torch.manual_seed(seed); np.random.seed(seed); random.seed(seed)
# Run training
exec(open('train.py').read())
# After training, save final best.pt as best_c.pt
shutil.copy('checkpoints/best.pt', 'checkpoints/best_c.pt')
print('Saved best_c.pt')
